title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3C1D-R1 — Retain Web Portable Failure Diagnostic
intent: Install and run the corrected retention version of the isolated V1A-3C1 Web Portable diagnostic, preserving the captured ValueError evidence with normalized Windows-path validation.
rollback_boundary: Remove only the three newly added V1A-3C1D-R1 Technical Core files and the new R1 diagnostic mission outputs if validation fails; preserve all existing FOXAI source, prior evidence, launchers, runtimes, packages, models, databases, personal files, Hanger Bay, and the K: rollback T7.

# Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3C1D-R1

This mission retains the bounded Web Portable failure diagnostic that mission
`ENG-20260721-212836-2DBDA9` captured successfully before its final validation
used an incorrect doubled-backslash path literal and caused rollback.

R1 preserves the diagnostic capture logic. The final validation normalizes both
actual and expected Windows paths with `pathlib.PureWindowsPath` before the
case-insensitive comparison.

Protected context:

- `Z:\FOXAI\START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat`
- `Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py`
- `Z:\FOXAI\env\python\python.exe`

Only the three diagnostic evidence files are retained. The seven normal closure
outputs are not generated. No FOXAI launchers or source modules are run, and no
models, ComfyUI components, network operations, installations, repairs, Hanger
Bay content, or rollback T7 content on `K:` are modified.

validations.name: Verify exact V1A-3C1D-R1 payloads, syntax, corrected retention contract, and zero forbidden imports
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast,hashlib,json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
drop=root/r"AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1D_R1"
installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks=[
 (drop/r"web_portable_closure_failure_diagnostic_v1r1.py",installed/r"web_portable_closure_failure_diagnostic_v1r1.py","085f05c6bc0baf2d366ecb32e4e94d9ad808ee04fd9c95f28eb0381da1deed90"),
 (drop/r"V1A3C1_FAILURE_DIAGNOSTIC_CONTRACT_V1R1.json",installed/r"V1A3C1_FAILURE_DIAGNOSTIC_CONTRACT_V1R1.json","bfb510044dc7faac73c98f816590185fb111fabd41fcc4d147dceee3b9398fe6"),
 (drop/r"README_V1A3C1D_R1.md",installed/r"README_V1A3C1D_R1.md","e3dbd469a2d88d9c2fb4985eb0e59d38ab6d0c9a7c84437ac151809b15500146"),
]
for src,dst,expected in checks:
 assert src.is_file() and dst.is_file(),(src,dst)
 assert hashlib.sha256(src.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected,src
 assert hashlib.sha256(dst.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected,dst
script=(installed/r"web_portable_closure_failure_diagnostic_v1r1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script,str(installed/r"web_portable_closure_failure_diagnostic_v1r1.py"),"exec")
tree=ast.parse(script)
imports=set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
 if isinstance(node,ast.Import): imports.update(a.name.split('.')[0] for a in node.names)
 elif isinstance(node,ast.ImportFrom) and node.module: imports.add(node.module.split('.')[0])
forbidden={"subprocess","socket","urllib","http","ftplib","requests","pip","ensurepip","psutil","winreg","ctypes","webbrowser","importlib"}
assert not (imports & forbidden),sorted(imports & forbidden)
contract=json.loads((installed/r"V1A3C1_FAILURE_DIAGNOSTIC_CONTRACT_V1R1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-214211-558DBA"
assert contract.get("corrects_mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-212836-2DBDA9"
assert contract.get("protected_direct_context_count")==1
assert contract.get("correction",{}).get("diagnostic_capture_logic_changed") is False
scope=contract.get("scope",{})
assert scope.get("normal_closure_outputs_generated") is False
assert scope.get("diagnostic_returns_success_after_capture") is True
assert scope.get("maximum_reads_per_reached_source")==1
assert scope.get("source_buffer_ceiling_bytes")==8388608
assert scope.get("diagnostic_output_ceiling_bytes")==1048576
assert scope.get("payload_interpreter_child_processes")==0
assert scope.get("payload_shell_child_processes")==0
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1D_R1_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")

validations.name: Run bounded R1 diagnostic capture self-test
Verify exact failed builder hash, prior evidence receipts, and protected Web Portable context
Capture and retain deterministic V1A-3C1 Web Portable closure diagnostic
Validate exact three-file diagnostic evidence set, hashes, safety, single-read ceiling, and sub-1-MiB output
Verify retained ValueError or explicit unexpected success using normalized Windows paths
argv:
from pathlib import Path,PureWindowsPath
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-214211-558DBA_V1A3C1D_R1_WEB_PORTABLE_DIAGNOSTIC")
required={"V1A3C1_FAILURE_DIAGNOSTIC.json","V1A3C1_FAILURE_TRACEBACK.txt","V1A3C1_DIAGNOSTIC_RECEIPT.json"}
present={p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()}
assert present==required,(present,required)
diag=json.loads((out/r"V1A3C1_FAILURE_DIAGNOSTIC.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
receipt=json.loads((out/r"V1A3C1_DIAGNOSTIC_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
trace=(out/r"V1A3C1_FAILURE_TRACEBACK.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
def norm_win(value):
 text=str(value or "").strip().strip('"').replace("/","\\")
 return str(PureWindowsPath(text)).casefold()
assert diag.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-214211-558DBA"
assert diag.get("subject_mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-172935-37F095"
assert diag.get("result") in {"captured_failure","unexpected_success"}
assert diag.get("protected_direct_context_count")==1
ctx=diag.get("context",{})
assert norm_win(ctx.get("launcher_path"))==norm_win(r"Z:\FOXAI\START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat")
assert norm_win(ctx.get("script_path"))==norm_win(r"Z:\FOXAI\core oxai_web.py")
assert norm_win(ctx.get("resolved_interpreter_path"))==norm_win(r"Z:\FOXAI\env\python\python.exe")
if diag.get("result")=="captured_failure":
 exc=diag.get("exception",{})
 assert exc.get("exception_type")=="ValueError",exc
 assert str(exc.get("message","")).strip(),exc
 assert diag.get("last_successful_stage")=="preliminary_closure_construction",diag.get("last_successful_stage")
 assert "ValueError" in trace,trace[:500]
else:
 assert diag.get("result")=="unexpected_success"
assert receipt.get("diagnostic_command_returned_success_after_recording") is True
assert receipt.get("normal_closure_outputs_generated") is False
assert receipt.get("interpreter_child_processes")==0 and receipt.get("shell_child_processes")==0
assert receipt.get("network_used") is False
assert receipt.get("packages_installed") is False
assert receipt.get("models_loaded") is False
for item in receipt.get("diagnostic_outputs_before_receipt",[]):
 p=out/item["name"]
 assert p.is_file() and p.stat().st_size==item["size_bytes"]
 assert hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==item["sha256"]
total=sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file())
assert total<1048576,total
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1D_R1_DIAGNOSTIC_RETAINED")
